comments: Approved. The contract successfully bounds the scope to generating 'documentation/EN/core-concepts/governance-protocols.md' and its Chinese equivalent. The objectives (Pre-Flight Plan, Smart Delegation, Context Pinning, and Anti-Token-Explosion) are strictly organizational and cognitive governance updates. The out_of_scope rules correctly forbid any modifications to the Node.js source files (src/) and CLI scripts (bin/), maintaining the boundary for this specific conceptual upgrade phase.
